title: GOD'S FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: SET FREE CHRISTIAN FELLOWSHIP GOD'S FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers services for the unhoused and low-income individuals and families including a food pantry, clothing distribution, and hot meals with bottled water. Shower and laundry services also available for those who are unhoused. 1032 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unhoused and low-income individuals and families. Shower and laundry services for unhoused people. Hours: Hot meals: Monday/Wednesday 9:30am, Friday noon (first-come, first served) Showers/Laundry: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-noon Clothing: Friday 9:30am-12:30pm Food pantry: Friday 9:30am-1:30pm Email (541) 773-4004 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (541) 773-4004 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10am-3pm Services: Community Meals Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Laundry Facilities Public Showers/Baths If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SET FREE CHRISTIAN FELLOWSHIP
